_comment: Magic Hat Desktop Profile Catalogue — single source of truth for all profile stacks

ai_companion.label: AI Companion
ai_companion.tagline: Familiar AI assistant, always-on briefings, privacy-first
ai_companion.description: Core AI layer. Installs Familiar dashboard, configures Ollama for local inference, sets up daily 8 AM briefings, activates the Familiar tray applet. Cannot be deselected.

privacy_suite.label: Privacy Suite
privacy_suite.tagline: Pi-hole ad blocking, SearXNG search, encrypted storage
privacy_suite.description: Network-level ad and tracker blocking via Pi-hole. Private self-hosted search via SearXNG. Firewall hardening and encrypted home directory option. Cannot be deselected.

creative_studio.label: Creative Studio
creative_studio.description: Professional creative tools. GIMP and Krita for raster art, Inkscape for vector, Blender for 3D, Kdenlive for video editing. Installs Jellyfin for media management. Best for the Artist job class.

gaming.label: Gaming
gaming.description: Full gaming stack. Steam via Flatpak, Lutris for GOG/Epic/emulation, MangoHud performance overlay. Installs GPU drivers if not already present. Enables 32-bit Mesa libs for Proton.

dev_workstation.label: Dev Workstation
dev_workstation.tagline: VS Code, Docker, Git tools, language runtimes
dev_workstation.description: Developer stack. VS Code (Flatpak), Docker Desktop, Gitea for self-hosted Git. Installs Python/Node/Go/Rust toolchains. Enables dev-friendly kernel settings. Best for daily coding work.
